description: Style NoteThe luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.Product DetailsKhaki coloured sandals, straps across the midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in place, buckle closure for ankle straps to offer a customised Fit, suede cushioned footbed, curved toward the toe for protection of the foot, brand embossed on the tongue, outsole with nubs and lugsMaterial and CareNubuk, TPRWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
